name: Real Estate Truth Calculator
metaTitle: Real Estate Truth Calculator — Real Returns After Tax, Stamp Duty & Inflation | c7xai
metaDescription: See the real return on property investment after stamp duty, registration, maintenance, capital gains tax, and inflation. Indian tax laws applied.
shortDescription: Real property returns after all hidden costs

faq.question: Is real estate really a good investment in India?
faq.answer: After stamp duty (5-7%), registration (1%), maintenance, property tax, and capital gains tax, real returns are often 3-5% per year — lower than most people expect.

faq.question: What is stamp duty and who pays it?
faq.answer: Stamp duty is a state government tax on property transactions, typically 5-7% of property value. It's paid by the buyer at the time of registration.

faq.question: How does leasehold vs freehold affect returns?
faq.answer: Leasehold properties typically appreciate 1-1.5% less per year because the underlying land ownership remains with the lessor. Freehold properties have full ownership rights.
